category.scope_note: Filtering respirator compliance comparison between Chinese baseline documentation and Thailand (TISI) controls, with focus on TISI conformity, Ministry of Labour occupational-safety framework, importer registration, and logistics gateways such as Laem Chabang and Bangkok.

title.en: China-to-Thailand PPE Respirator (Filtering Respirator) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国过滤式呼吸器进入泰国：合规差距对照
title.zht: 中國過濾式呼吸器進入泰國：合規差距對照

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese filtering-respirator documentation against Thailand (TISI), Ministry of Labour occupational framework, Ministry of Industry controls, and entry requirements through Laem Chabang and Bangkok logistics nodes, including in-country importer requirements, with 230 V 50 Hz electrical context for accessories.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国过滤式呼吸器文件与泰国（TISI）、泰国劳动部职业安全框架、工业部管制要求及经由Laem Chabang与曼谷口岸入境的情形对照，包含泰国本地进口主体要求，并覆盖附件的230V 50Hz工况背景。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國過濾式呼吸器文件與泰國（TISI）、泰國勞動部職業安全框架、工業部管制要求及經由Laem Chabang與曼谷口岸入境的情形對照，包含泰國本地進口主體要求，並覆蓋附件的230V 50Hz工況背景。

disclaimer.en: This dataset is an informational comparison aid, not legal advice, customs ruling, test-lab certification, or final market-access permission. Exporters and importers should verify current official texts and product classification with TISI, Ministry of Labour, Ministry of Industry, NBTC, and DEDE/EGAT references before shipment and market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成法律建议、海关裁定、实验室认证或最终市场准入许可。出口商与进口商应在出货和投放市场前，使用官方文本与TISI、劳动部、工业部、NBTC以及DEDE/EGAT官方依据确认产品分类和最新要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成法律建議、海關裁定、檢驗室認證或最終市場准入許可。出口商與進口商應在出貨和投放市場前，使用官方文本與TISI、勞動部、工業部、NBTC以及DEDE/EGAT官方依據確認產品分類和最新要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese respirator files such as GB 2626 and GB/T accessories evidence are useful technical references but do not automatically satisfy Thailand market controls. Key Thailand gates are TISI compliance interpretation, Ministry of Labour occupational safety obligations, and importer-linked placement in Thailand. For powered accessories or telecom-enabled functions, NBTC and EGAT/DEDE requirements are separately checked. Main electrical context is 230 V 50 Hz.
answer_first.zh: 中国GB 2626及GB/T附件证据是有价值的技术参考，但不能自动满足泰国市场要求。泰国关键门槛是TISI合规解释、劳动部职业安全义务，以及通过本地进口方进行泰国市场投放。对于带电源或通信功能的附件，还需分别核对NBTC与EGAT/DEDE要求。主要电气语境为230V 50Hz。
answer_first.zht: 中國GB 2626及GB/T配件證據是有價值的技術參考，但不能自動滿足泰國市場要求。泰國關鍵門檻是TISI合規解讀、勞動部職業安全義務，以及通過本地進口方進行泰國市場投放。對於帶電源或通信功能的配件，還需分別核對NBTC與EGAT/DEDE要求。主要電氣語境為230V 50Hz。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Update rows when TISI scope notices, mandatory-product lists, Ministry of Labour PPE guidance, or in-country importer rules change.
